issues.productTitle: Gatorlyte Powder Watermelon, 16.9oz (Pack of 6)
issues.rationale: Multiple bullets violate style guide rules: they include ending punctuation (periods after bullet 2, 5, and 6), bullet 6 contains a colon-introduced comparative claim with full sentences rather than a fragment, and bullet 1 uses a pipe delimiter instead of a semicolon to separate phrases — collectively degrading listing quality and risking Amazon content policy enforcement. Hi-Lyte (avg rank #4) may serve as a reference.

issues.productTitle: Gatorlyte Powder Orange, 16.9oz (Pack of 6)
issues.issueType: Bullet points contain prohibited formatting and punctuation
issues.rationale: Multiple bullet points include ending punctuation (periods), a pipe character used as a separator, and an exclamation-style comparative claim with a colon label ('Lower Sugar:'), all of which violate the style guide rules prohibiting periods, symbols, and hyphens in bullet points, undermining listing compliance and professionalism. Hi-Lyte (avg rank #4) may serve as a reference.

issues.productTitle: Liquid Iv Hydration Lemon Lime 10 Count 5.65 OZ
issues.issueType: Bullet points contain promotional/company-specific content instead of product features
issues.rationale: All five bullet points focus on brand mission, company values, and corporate impact programs rather than the product's key features (ingredients, usage, benefits, format, quantity), directly violating the style guide requirement to highlight features customers should consider while prohibiting company-specific information and promotional content. Hi-Lyte (avg rank #4) may serve as a reference.

issues.productTitle: Propel Zero Water Variety - 24/16.9 oz.
issues.rationale: The title omits the required brand name 'Gatorade' per the format rule '[Brand] + [sub-brand if applicable] + [product type]…', meaning shoppers and Amazon's catalog cannot correctly attribute the product, undermining discoverability and brand trust. Gatorade (avg rank #32) may serve as a reference.
